theme.vibe: Cálido y acogedor meets Moderno y sobrio

typography.rules: Never use Inter. Headings must have tracking-tight. Line height tight for headers, loose for body.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. p-8 to p-12 minimum for main sections.
layout_strategy.bento_grid: Tetris Mode (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8) for News and Events to break symmetry.

hero.style: Full width, image background with bg-black/40 overlay. Text aligned left. Large Outfit H1.

radio_player.name: Impacto de Dios al Pueblo
radio_player.style: Compact cardless or neumorphic flat design. Dark theme (bg-[#2C302E]) text-white. Include play/pause button (primary color), volume, 'En Vivo' indicator.

news_events_section.style: Tetris bento grid. Featured event spans 8 columns, news span 4 columns. Containers with borders must have internal padding p-6 or p-8.

admin_dashboard.style: Dense Control Room Grid. 1px borders, cardless. High contrast.

images.description: Warm welcoming interior for the hero section.
Microphone image for radio section visual interest.
Modern clean interior for featured event backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Write all public-facing content in Latin American Spanish.
Ensure the radio player is embedded on the same page, not redirecting.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, inputs).
Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react for an elegant look.
Follow 'Cálido y acogedor' combined with 'Moderno y sobrio'. High contrast, clean layouts, warm colors.
Build the admin dashboard for managing news and events using Shadcn components.
Avoid using Shadcn Cards for the public marketing layout; use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Bento Grid.
